title: Leeds Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Leeds with a Z-Score of -3.00. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Leeds are extremely cold, with a high Z-Score indicating a significant deviation from normal temperatures. 
 The city is experiencing a critical cold snap, with 11.5 GG of heating degree days and 0.0 GG of cooling degree days. 
 The relative humidity is 82% and the wind speed is 7.2 km/h, contributing to the extreme cold.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to ensure public safety and minimize disruptions.
